title: Bornmuellera cappadocica
taxonomy: Bornmuellera cappadocica is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It is a member of the genus Bornmuellera, which is a group of small, annual plants native to the Mediterranean region. Bornmuellera cappadocica is further classified under the family Brassicaceae, which includes other plants commonly known as mustards, cabbages, and broccoli. The species falls under the order Brassicales, a group of flowering plants that also includes shepherds' purse and watercress. Bornmuellera cappadocica's classification is as follows: Kingdom: Plantae, Phylum: Angiospermophyta, Class: Magnoliopsida, Order: Brassicales, Family: Brassicaceae, Genus: Bornmuellera, Species: B. cappadocica.
